helpful: The provisioned full petition text was the single most valuable input — the split map, vehicle claims, and respondent's concession all came from it.
The per-Term paid/IFP fee-class grant rates in statpack.json gave a much better anchor (paid ~5.4%) than the blended ~2.5% rate.
gaps: A 'response requested (CFR)' cut in the statpack, analogous to the relist and CVSG cuts — the CFR is the dominant observable signal for this cell and I had to estimate its lift from general knowledge.
The prompt-referenced 'Segment base rate by salience band' table is absent from the committed statpack build.

fedcourts query --citation returned 0 rows for both a statute and case citations at scotus scope; cert-stage dockets likely lack opinion-text citation indexing, making the priors surface near-useless for cert cells.
A BIO was not yet filed, so nothing to weigh against the petition — expected for a pending case, not a tooling defect.
notes: Forward cell in clean shape: fresh snapshot (through Jul 15, 2026), full petition text, no leakage encountered.
